style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like fireflies, dissolving into iridescent petal-shaped particles that pulse softly with a pastel pink aura. The ethereal glow emanates from the body in a rounded, heart-shaped halo of pale lavender light, casting a warm but delicate glow that refracts into rainbow hues on nearby surfaces. Soft musical note vibrations shimmer in the air as faint, translucent sound waves ripple outward from its wings. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
